commands.repair_reason: - No automated repair is needed; maintainer review should refresh against current main and decide whether to land the additive gateway RPC.; Cleared: The diff adds an operator-admin RPC and uses existing chat.send admin-only system provenance; it does not change dependencies, CI, secrets, package resolution, or release scripts. commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a `skills.proposals.requestRevision` gateway RPC and routes Skill Workshop revision sends through it so the UI queues only the visible user instructions while the server validates the pending proposal and builds the hidden agent handoff.

PR surface: Source +255, Tests +238. Total +493 across 19 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main builds the Skill Workshop revision handoff and user instructions into one string before sending it to chat. I did not run a live UI reproduction because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair is needed; maintainer review should refresh against current main and decide whether to land the additive gateway RPC.
